title: helichrysum diotoides
intro: Helichrysum diotoides, also known as small leafever or small leaf gum plant, is a shrub-like perennial plant native to South Africa, belonging to the sunflower family. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum diotoides lie in its essential oils, particularly the sesquiterpene lactones, which have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting immune function, making it a popular natural remedy for various health issues. Helichrysum diotoides can be prepared as herbal teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which are used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
